use_cases: Form submission and data processing actions in web applications
Navigation triggers and call-to-action elements on landing pages
Interactive controls for UI component libraries and design systems
User interaction handlers in SaaS dashboards and admin panels
Primary action triggers in e-commerce checkout flows
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and supports standard HTML button attributes including disabled states. Features subtle shadows and rounded corners for a clean, modern appearance suitable for various UI contexts.
